args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" >/dev/null
printf '{}' > "$bundle_dir/diagnostics.json"
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- verify --bundle "$bundle_dir" >/tmp/sock-verify-out.txt 2>/tmp/sock-verify-err.txt; then
  echo 'verify unexpectedly passed' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'digest mismatch' /tmp/sock-verify-err.txt
printf 'fail-closed\n'
